_meta:
  cell_type: cylindrical
  format: "21700"
  design_intent: "77.9 Ah NMC111 21700 cell for EV traction battery with 1500+ cycle life"
  target_capacity_ah: 77.9
  target_energy_wh: 288.2
  target_energy_density_wh_kg: 176.0
  nominal_voltage_v: 3.7
  temperature_range_c: [-20, 45]

geometry:
  diameter_mm: 21.0
  length_mm: 70.0

  can_bottom_thickness_mm: 0.50
  header_height_mm: 4.0

winding:

  winding_clearance_mm: 0.12
  winding_tension_factor: 0.94
  tab_type: "traditional"
  anode_tab_width_mm: 7.5
  anode_tab_thickness_mm: 0.12
  cathode_tab_width_mm: 6.5

electrochemistry:

    material_name: "NMC111 (LiNi0.33Mn0.33Co0.33O2)"

  anode:

    loading_mg_cm2: 15.8
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 360.0
    collector_thickness_um: 9.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 95.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 102.0
    porosity_pct: 35.0
    np_ratio: 1.15
  separator:
    material_name: "Ceramic-coated PP/PE trilayer"
    thickness_um: 15.0
    porosity_pct: 45.0
    areal_weight_mgcm2: 1.2
  electrolyte:
    material_name: "LiPF6 in EC:EMC:DEC (3:5:2 wt%)"
    density_g_cm3: 1.24
    excess_factor: 1.08

housing:
  can_material: "nickel_plated_steel"
  header_mass_g: 2.2
  bottom_insulator_mass_g: 0.15
  top_insulator_mass_g: 0.12

_meta:
  cell_type: pouch
  design_intent: "4.5Ah NMC622 high-power pouch cell for cordless drill; fast-charge capable (1C), optimized for <1hr charge time"

geometry:
  cathode_height_mm: 90.0
  cathode_width_mm: 70.0
  anode_offset_mm: 1.5
  separator_offset_mm: 2.0

stack_config:
  num_stacks: 1
  electrode_pairs_per_stack: 15
  end_electrode_config: "BothNegative"
  separator_overwraps: 1

electrochemistry:
  cathode:
    material_name: "NMC622"
    loading_mg_cm2: 18.0
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 185.0
    collector_thickness_um: 12.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 50.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 52.0
    porosity_pct: 35.0
  anode:
    material_name: "Graphite"
    loading_mg_cm2: 10.0
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 360.0
    collector_thickness_um: 6.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 65.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 70.0
    porosity_pct: 40.0
    np_ratio: 1.12
  separator:
    material_name: "PE"
    thickness_um: 12.0

    material_name: "LiPF6 in EC:EMC (3:7)"

tabs:

  anode:

    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 55.0

    porosity_pct: 28.0
  anode:

    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 80.0

    porosity_pct: 35.0
    np_ratio: 1.15
  separator:
    material_name: "PE (Polyethylene)"
    thickness_um: 16.0

    areal_weight_mgcm2: 1.2
  electrolyte:

attempts.raw_llm_output:
_meta:
  cell_type: cylindrical
  format: custom
  design_intent: "111.4 Ah LFP cylindrical cell for grid energy storage with 7143+ cycle life, -20°C to +52°C operation"
  target_capacity_ah: 111.4
  target_voltage_v: 3.2
  target_energy_density_whkg: 172.0
  cycle_life_target: 7143

geometry:
  diameter_mm: 46.0
  length_mm: 95.0
  can_wall_thickness_mm: 0.30
  can_bottom_thickness_mm: 0.5
  header_height_mm: 5.0

winding:
  mandrel_diameter_mm: 5.0
  winding_clearance_mm: 0.20
  winding_tension_factor: 0.96
  tab_type: "traditional"
  anode_tab_width_mm: 12.0
  anode_tab_thickness_mm: 0.15
  cathode_tab_width_mm: 12.0
  cathode_tab_thickness_mm: 0.15

electrochemistry:
  cathode:
    material_name: "LFP (LiFePO₄)"
    loading_mg_cm2: 18.5
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 165.0
    collector_thickness_um: 15.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 75.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 78.0
    porosity_pct: 32.0
  anode:
    material_name: "Graphite"
    loading_mg_cm2: 11.2
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 355.0
    collector_thickness_um: 8.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 95.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 102.0
    porosity_pct: 38.0
    np_ratio: 1.15
  separator:
    material_name: "PE (Polyethylene)"
    thickness_um: 15.0
    porosity_pct: 50.0
    areal_weight_mgcm2: 1.2
  electrolyte:
    material_name: "LiPF6 in EC:DMC (1:1)"
    density_g_cm3: 1.18
    excess_factor: 1.15

housing:
  can_material: "aluminum"
  header_mass_g: 5.5
  bottom_insulator_mass_g: 0.2
  top_insulator_mass_g: 0.15

attempts.raw_llm_output:
_meta:
  cell_type: pouch
  design_intent: "Fast-charging tablet cell: 0-80% in <30min, ultra-thin form factor (8mm), NMC622 chemistry"

geometry:
  cathode_height_mm: 120.0
  cathode_width_mm: 85.0
  anode_offset_mm: 1.5
  separator_offset_mm: 2.0

stack_config:
  num_stacks: 1
  electrode_pairs_per_stack: 15
  end_electrode_config: "BothNegative"
  separator_overwraps: 1

electrochemistry:
  cathode:
    material_name: "NMC622"
    loading_mg_cm2: 10.0
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 175.0
    collector_thickness_um: 10.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 45.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 48.0
    porosity_pct: 38.0
  anode:
    material_name: "Graphite"
    loading_mg_cm2: 6.5
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 360.0
    collector_thickness_um: 5.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 50.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 55.0
    porosity_pct: 42.0
    np_ratio: 1.12
  separator:
    material_name: "High-porosity PE"
    thickness_um: 12.0
    porosity_pct: 50.0
    areal_weight_mgcm2: 0.9
  electrolyte:
    material_name: "LiPF6 in EC:EMC (fast-charge optimized)"
    density_g_cm3: 1.20
    excess_factor: 1.05

tabs:
  cathode:
    material: "Aluminum"
    height_mm: 20.0
    width_mm: 25.0
    thickness_mm: 0.2
  anode:
    material: "Copper"
    height_mm: 20.0
    width_mm: 20.0
    thickness_mm: 0.15

packaging:
  pouch_thickness_mm: 0.08
  offset_top_mm: 5.0
  offset_bottom_mm: 3.0
  offset_sides_mm: 3.0

_meta:
  cell_type: cylindrical
  format: "21700"
  design_intent: "72.7 Ah NMC622 21700 cell for EV traction battery"

geometry:
  diameter_mm: 21.0
  length_mm: 70.0
  can_wall_thickness_mm: 0.30
  can_bottom_thickness_mm: 0.5
  header_height_mm: 3.5

winding:
  mandrel_diameter_mm: 3.5
  winding_clearance_mm: 0.12
  winding_tension_factor: 0.93
  tab_type: "traditional"
  anode_tab_width_mm: 8.0
  anode_tab_thickness_mm: 0.12
  cathode_tab_width_mm: 7.0
  cathode_tab_thickness_mm: 0.18

electrochemistry:
  cathode:
    material_name: "NMC622"
    loading_mg_cm2: 26.5
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 185.0
    collector_thickness_um: 14.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 75.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 78.0
    porosity_pct: 28.0
  anode:
    material_name: "Graphite"
    loading_mg_cm2: 15.8
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 360.0
    collector_thickness_um: 9.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 105.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 112.0
    porosity_pct: 35.0
    np_ratio: 1.15
  separator:
    material_name: "Ceramic-coated PE"
    thickness_um: 13.0
    porosity_pct: 40.0
    areal_weight_mgcm2: 1.1
  electrolyte:
    material_name: "LiPF6 in EC:EMC:DEC"
    density_g_cm3: 1.23
    excess_factor: 1.08

housing:
  can_material: "nickel_plated_steel"
  header_mass_g: 2.1
  bottom_insulator_mass_g: 0.12
  top_insulator_mass_g: 0.12

_meta:
  cell_type: pouch
  design_intent: "145.3 Ah LFP pouch cell for EV traction battery pack"

geometry:
  cathode_height_mm: 200.0
  cathode_width_mm: 150.0
  anode_offset_mm: 2.0
  separator_offset_mm: 2.5

stack_config:
  num_stacks: 1
  electrode_pairs_per_stack: 50
  end_electrode_config: "BothNegative"
  separator_overwraps: 2

electrochemistry:
  cathode:
    material_name: "LFP"
    loading_mg_cm2: 18.0
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 160.0
    collector_thickness_um: 12.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 65.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 68.0
    porosity_pct: 28.0
  anode:
    material_name: "Graphite"
    loading_mg_cm2: 10.5
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 360.0
    collector_thickness_um: 6.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 80.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 85.0
    porosity_pct: 38.0
    np_ratio: 1.12
  separator:
    material_name: "Ceramic-coated PP"
    thickness_um: 16.0
    porosity_pct: 45.0
    areal_weight_mgcm2: 1.5
  electrolyte:
    material_name: "LiPF6 in EC:EMC:DEC"
    density_g_cm3: 1.20
    excess_factor: 1.15

tabs:
  cathode:
    material: "Aluminum"
    height_mm: 40.0
    width_mm: 50.0
    thickness_mm: 0.4
  anode:
